# Garden ROI Web — Copilot Instructions

> **`AGENTS.md` at the repository root is the canonical instruction set for all agents on this project.**
> All session protocols, coding standards, content standards, SEO requirements, and role split are defined there.
> This file exists only to satisfy Copilot's `.github/copilot-instructions.md` discovery path.
> AGENTS.md is also loaded directly via `.vscode/settings.json` — Copilot reads both.

Read AGENTS.md before doing any work.

**Never start work without reading `tasks.md` first.** This file is provider-agnostic — any AI agent working on this project must follow this protocol.

**Story range mode:** If given specific story IDs (e.g., "complete A001-A003"), work each in sequence per the tasks.md entry. Do not skip ahead or batch stories.
